title: Arch Capital Group Ltd (ACGL) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Arch Capital Group Ltd (NASDAQ:ACGL ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Marc Grandisson - CEO & Director Francois Morin - EVP, CFO & Treasurer Conference Call Participants Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo Securities Tracy Benguigui - Barclays Bank Jamminder Bhullar - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Michael Zaremski - BMO Capital Markets Joshua Shanker - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Meyer Shields - KBW Brian Meredith - UBS Ryan Tunis - Autonomous Research Yaron Kinar - Jefferies Operator Good day, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to the Q2 2023 Arch Capital Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: Arch Capital (ACGL) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: Arch Capital (ACGL) Q2 results reflect improved premiums and higher net investment income on the back of improved Insurance and Reinsurance segment performance.

title: Arch Capital (ACGL) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Arch Capital (ACGL) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.92 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.65 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.34 per share a year ago.

title: Arch Capital Group Ltd. Reports 2023 Second Quarter Results
text: PEMBROKE, Bermuda--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: ACGL; “Arch” or “the Company”) announces its 2023 second quarter results. The results included: Net income available to Arch common shareholders of $661 million, or $1.75 per share, a 19.6% annualized net income return on average common equity, compared to $394 million, or $1.04 per share, for the 2022 second quarter. title: 5 Insurers Set to Outperform Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Better pricing, exposure growth, accelerated digitalization and sturdy capital are expected to help ACGL, AIZ, AEL, AON and AFL outperform Q2 earnings estimates.

title: Arch Capital (ACGL) to Report Q2 Earnings: Is a Beat in Store?
text: Arch Capital's (ACGL) second-quarter 2023 earnings are likely to reflect growth in most lines of business, rate increases, new business opportunities and higher yields, offset by higher expenses.

text: Arch Capital (ACGL) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Insurance Leader Arch Capital Eyes Buy Point With Accelerating Sales Growth
